---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new script or improvement
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is this a new script idea or an improvement to an existing one?**
New script / Improvement to existing

**If improving an existing script, which one?**
e.g. Weekly Maintenance, Large File Finder, etc.

**Describe what you'd like**
A clear description of what the script or feature should do.

**Why would this be useful?**
Explain the problem this solves or the workflow it improves on the Steam Deck.

**Example output (optional)**
If you have a rough idea of what the output should look like, paste it here.

Example output here

**Additional context**
Any other details, links, or screenshots.
